turns.speaker: Coworker
turns.text: You're the only one talented enough to finish my part too — you'd be a hero for doing it.

turns.speaker: Peer
turns.text: That's the third time this month. I don't think this is about my talent.

turns.speaker: Coworker
turns.text: Wow, I was paying you a compliment and you turn it into an attack?

turns.speaker: Coworker
turns.text: Whatever. Forget I asked. I'll remember this next time you need something.
